goal: Track popup/interest signals: sign-in gate, login-reward + deck-reward popups
done: Added popup_shown + popup_dismissed trackers. sign-in-gate.js fires popup_shown{popup:signin_gate, surface:<page>, in_app} on show and popup_dismissed on decline/backdrop/esc — captures interest from EVERY surface that opens the gate (reading save, streak chip, deck tap). login-reward.js → popup_shown{popup:login_reward, deck_id:veila-tarot}; deck-reward.js → popup_shown{popup:deck_reward, deck_id} at milestone unlock.
verified: chrome harness on decks.html: tapping a deck logged-out fired deck_selected + deck_unlock_prompt{reason:signin_required} + popup_shown{popup:signin_gate, surface:decks} into dataLayer w/ gtm.uniqueEventId. node --check passes; md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
